Demo applications and tests for Pebble firmware, including graphics, menus, sensors, and system features.

## Folders
- **[demo_images](demo_images/README.md)**: Static constant arrays and `GBitmap` structures for internal image representation and storage.
- **[gfx_tests](gfx_tests/README.md)**: Graphics tests for circles, GPath masking, rotated bitmaps, single lines, text rendering, and clipping.

## Files
- **[action_menu_demo.c](action_menu_demo.c.md)**: Demonstrates an action menu with multiple levels and actions for a Pebble app.
- **[action_menu_demo.h](action_menu_demo.h.md)**: Declares a function to get app information for the action menu demo.
- **[activity_test.c](activity_test.c.md)**: Tests for the activity API, including step counting, sleep tracking, and activity insights.
- **[activity_test.h](activity_test.h.md)**: Declares a function to get application information for the activity test.
- **[ambient_light_reading_app.c](ambient_light_reading_app.c.md)**: An application for reading and displaying ambient light levels on a Pebble device.
- **[animated_demo.c](animated_demo.c.md)**: Implements an animated demo application for Pebble firmware with button interactions and animations.
- **[animated_demo.h](animated_demo.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata of the animated demo application in Pebble firmware.
- **[app_heap_demo.c](app_heap_demo.c.md)**: Demonstrates memory allocation and deallocation in a Pebble app by using 75% of available memory.
- **[app_heap_demo.h](app_heap_demo.h.md)**: Defines a function to retrieve metadata for the app heap demo application.
- **[bouncing_box.c](bouncing_box.c.md)**: Implements a demo application for a bouncing box animation with color changes on collision.
- **[bouncing_box.h](bouncing_box.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata of the bouncing box demo app in Pebble firmware.
- **[click_app.c](click_app.c.md)**: Implements a demo application for handling various click events on a Pebble device.
- **[click_app.h](click_app.h.md)**: Declares a function to get metadata information for the click app.
- **[data_logging_test.c](data_logging_test.c.md)**: A data logging test application for Pebble firmware, including CRC32 calculation and session management.
- **[data_logging_test.h](data_logging_test.h.md)**: Declares a function to get metadata for the data logging test process.
- **[deadlock_app.c](deadlock_app.c.md)**: Demonstrates a deadlock scenario using mutexes and timers in a Pebble app.
- **[deadlock_app.h](deadlock_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata of the deadlock demo app in Pebble firmware.
- **[dialogs_demo.c](dialogs_demo.c.md)**: Demonstrates various dialog types and interactions for a Pebble smartwatch application.
- **[dialogs_demo.h](dialogs_demo.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving application metadata for the dialogs demo in Pebble firmware.
- **[double_tap_test.c](double_tap_test.c.md)**: Implements a Pebble app to test double-tap detection and display feedback on the screen.
- **[double_tap_test.h](double_tap_test.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information about the double tap test process.
- **[event_service_app.c](event_service_app.c.md)**: Implements an event service demo app for handling tap and Bluetooth connection events.
- **[event_service_app.h](event_service_app.h.md)**: Declares a function to get metadata for the event service app.
- **[exit_app.c](exit_app.c.md)**: Tests the ability of applications to call the standard library's exit function and logs privilege status.
- **[exit_app.h](exit_app.h.md)**: Declares a function to get application information for the exit app in Pebble firmware.
- **[flash_demo.c](flash_demo.c.md)**: Demonstrates flash memory operations including reading, writing, and erasing in a Pebble app.
- **[flash_demo.h](flash_demo.h.md)**: Declares a function to get application information for the flash demo.

- **[flash_diagnostic_app.h](flash_diagnostic_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information of the flash diagnostic app.
- **[flash_prof.c](flash_prof.c.md)**: A demo application for profiling flash read times using a number window interface.
- **[flash_prof.h](flash_prof.h.md)**: Declares a function to get application information for flash profiling.

- **[flash_test.h](flash_test.h.md)**: Declares a function to get application information for the flash test demo.

- **[fps_test_app.h](fps_test_app.h.md)**: Declares a function to get application information for the FPS test app.
